productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid White Shirts
description: CompositionWhite shirt made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar, full buttoned placket on the front, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs, two patch pockets on the chest with buttoned flaps, stitch detailing and pin tucks on the front and back, and has a curved hemFittingRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm ironDo not iron directly on print/embroiderySubtle and stylish, this white shirt from united colors of benetton is perfect for casual wear. The mandarin collar and pin tucks bring an interesting edge, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long.
